narrative.headline: Power train tops the 2018 Toyota Sienna complaint list, with air bags the biggest safety concern
narrative.summary: Of 67 owner complaints filed with NHTSA, the power train is the most reported area at 16 reports (24%), followed by the fuel/propulsion system at 9 (13%), the electrical system at 6 (9%), and the engine and air bags tied at 5 each (7%). Most categories report no crashes, fires, or injuries, but the air bag complaints stand out: 4 of the 5 involved a crash and 5 people were injured. Buyers should pay close attention to the power train and have the air bag system inspected before purchase.
